Subscription Recovery Dashboard

Pilot view for finance teams. Connect bank data, detect recurring spend, and track recoverable savings.

KPIs

Recovery rate

—

Confirmed ÷ potential (monthly $)

Confirmed / potential

—

Ratio in dollars

—

Confirmed in ledger

—

Rows with confirmed $ / total findings

Recent detection runs

No runs recorded yet. Run detection once to populate history (stored per organization).

CSV export

Dates filter finding created_at (findings) or ledger created_at (savings), unless "realized date" is checked for savings (basis=realized).

Subscription owners

Assign a finance owner per detected subscription. After each detection run, subscriptions without an owner get an owner_gap finding until someone is assigned (then open owner_gap rows for that line close automatically).

No subscriptions loaded.
